buzzNote: high anticipation as first female-led YRF Spy Universe entry, but lowest franchise opening
summaryLine: Grand-scale spy spectacle sunk by a weak, unengaging screenplay.
theRead: Critics agree Alpha looks lavish and that Alia Bhatt brings conviction to a female-led entry in the YRF Spy Universe, with Sharvari holding her own in the action. The near-unanimous knock is the writing: a thin, predictable screenplay and lackluster direction that squander the scale and leave the film emotionally hollow. Most reviews land mixed-to-negative, treating it as a franchise low point.
watchIf: Watch if you liked the YRF Spy Universe spectacle of War and Tiger 3.
